name: plugin-package-policy
title: 落实插件 Package Policy
description: 定义并统一执行 CLI 与 Nexus 的 TPEX Manifest、归档、清单、版本和限制策略。
creator: TalexDreamSoul
notes: Shared Package Policy is enforced by CLI validate/builder and Nexus preview/publish/re-edit. 59 focused assertions, CLI Core build, Nexus typecheck, scoped lint, 21 canonical Manifest policy checks, 23-directory legacy validation and a real touch-quickops builder smoke passed.
